proof:
constructor
  · exact stAn.mpr notallknave
  · constructor
    · exact BKnight
    · set_knave_to_knight
      intro CKn
      exfalso
      exact this CKn
failed_attempts:
have AKnave' : A ∈ Knave := by
    set_knight_to_knave
    exact AKnave
  have BKn : B ∈ Knight := BKnight
  have CKnave : C ∈ Knave := by
    set_knave_to_knight
    intro CKnight
    exact this CKnight
  exact ⟨AKnave', ⟨BKn, CKnave⟩⟩

set_knight_to_knave at this
  refine ⟨?_, ?_, ?_⟩
  · set_knave_to_knight at AKnave
    exact (knightknave_excl AKnave).resolve_left
  · exact BKnight
  · exact this

have CKnave : C ∈ Knave := by
    set_knave_to_knight
    intro CKnight
    exact this CKnight
  exact ⟨(set_knight_to_knave at AKnave; AKnave), ⟨BKnight, CKnave⟩⟩

have CKnave : C ∈ Knave := by
    set_knave_to_knight
    intro CKnight
    exact this CKnight
  constructor
  · set_knight_to_knave
    exact AKnave
  · constructor
    · exact BKnight
    · exact CKnave

have CKnave : C ∈ Knave := by
    set_knave_to_knight
    intro CKnight
    exact this CKnight
  constructor
  · set_knight_to_knave
    exact AKnave
  · constructor
    · exact BKnight
    · exact CKnave

constructor
  · set_knight_to_knave at AKnave
    exact AKnave
  · constructor
    · exact BKnight
    · set_knave_to_knight
      intro CKn
      have : Knave = ({A,B,C} : Finset Inhabitant) :=
        (everyone_in_set_eq all).mp ⟨by
          set_knight_to_knave at AKnave
          exact AKnave, ⟨by
          set_knight_to_knave
          exact BKnight, CKn⟩⟩
      exact notallknave this

have CKnave : C ∈ Knave := by
    set_knave_to_knight
    intro CKnight
    exact this CKnight
  exact ⟨(KorKn A).1 AKnave, ⟨BKnight, CKnave⟩⟩
successful_attempts:
constructor
  · exact stAn.mpr notallknave
  · constructor
    · exact BKnight
    · set_knave_to_knight
      intro CKn
      exfalso
      exact this CKn

have CKnave : C ∈ Knave := by
    set_knave_to_knight
    intro CKnight
    exact this CKnight
  constructor
  · set_knight_to_knave at AKnave
    exact AKnave
  · constructor
    · exact BKnight
    · exact CKnave

have CKnave : C ∈ Knave := by
    set_knave_to_knight
    intro CKnight
    exact this CKnight
  constructor
  · set_knight_to_knave at AKnave
    exact AKnave
  · constructor
    · exact BKnight
    · exact CKnave

have CKnave : C ∈ Knave := by
    set_knave_to_knight
    intro CKnight
    exact this CKnight
  constructor
  · set_knight_to_knave at AKnave
    exact AKnave
  · constructor
    · exact BKnight
    · exact CKnave

have AKnave' : A ∈ Knave := by
    set_knight_to_knave at AKnave
    exact AKnave
  have CKnave : C ∈ Knave := by
    set_knave_to_knight
    intro CKnight
    exact this CKnight
  exact ⟨AKnave', ⟨BKnight, CKnave⟩⟩

refine ⟨?_, ?_, ?_⟩
  · set_knight_to_knave at AKnave
    exact AKnave
  · exact BKnight
  · set_knave_to_knight
    intro CKnight
    exact this CKnight

have CKnave : C ∈ Knave := by
    set_knave_to_knight
    intro CKnight
    exact this CKnight
  constructor
  · set_knight_to_knave at AKnave
    exact AKnave
  · constructor
    · exact BKnight
    · exact CKnave

have CKnave : C ∈ Knave := by
    set_knave_to_knight
    intro CKnight
    exact this CKnight
  exact ⟨(by
    set_knight_to_knave at AKnave
    exact AKnave), ⟨BKnight, CKnave⟩⟩

have CKnave : C ∈ Knave := by
    set_knave_to_knight
    intro CKnight
    exact this CKnight
  constructor
  · set_knight_to_knave at AKnave
    exact AKnave
  · constructor
    · exact BKnight
    · exact CKnave

have CKnave : C ∈ Knave := by
    set_knave_to_knight
    intro CKnight
    exact this CKnight
  constructor
  · set_knight_to_knave at AKnave
    exact AKnave
  · constructor
    · exact BKnight
    · exact CKnave

have CKnave : C ∈ Knave := by
    set_knave_to_knight
    intro CKnight
    exact this CKnight
  constructor
  · set_knight_to_knave at AKnave
    exact AKnave
  · constructor
    · exact BKnight
    · exact CKnave

have CKnave : C ∈ Knave := by

    intro CKnight
    exact this CKnight
  constructor
  · set_knight_to_knave at AKnave
    exact AKnave
  · constructor
    · exact BKnight
    · exact CKnave

have CKnave : C ∈ Knave := by

    intro CKnight
    exact this CKnight
  exact ⟨by
    set_knight_to_knave at AKnave
    exact AKnave, ⟨BKnight, CKnave⟩⟩

have CKnave : C ∈ Knave := by

    intro CKnight
    exact this CKnight
  constructor
  · set_knight_to_knave at AKnave
    exact AKnave
  · constructor
    · exact BKnight
    · exact CKnave

have CKnave : C ∈ Knave := by
    set_knave_to_knight
    intro CKnight
    exact this CKnight
  exact ⟨by
    set_knight_to_knave at AKnave
    exact AKnave, ⟨BKnight, CKnave⟩⟩

have CKnave : C ∈ Knave := by

    intro CKnight
    exact this CKnight
  constructor
  · set_knight_to_knave at AKnave
    exact AKnave
  · constructor

    · exact CKnave

have CKnave : C ∈ Knave := by

    exact this CKnight
  exact ⟨by

    exact AKnave, ⟨BKnight, CKnave⟩⟩

  constructor
  · set_knight_to_knave at AKnave

  constructor
  · exact BKnight

    intro CKnight

  exact ⟨by

    exact AKnave, ⟨BKnight, CKnave⟩⟩

    intro CKnight

have CKnavet : C ∈ Knave := by

    intro CKnight
    exact this CKnight
  constructor
  · set_knight_to_knave at AKnave

  · set_knight_to_knave at AKnave

    exact this CKnight
  exact ⟨by
